languages.text: "Мой дражайший коллега никогда бы не раскрыл приватную информацию обо мне. К тому же, у меня нет от вас секретов, кроме тех, что обусловлены таинствами Культа Машины".
"My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."
languages.original_text: "Мой дражайший коллега никогда бы не раскрыл приватную информацию обо мне. К тому же, у меня нет от вас секретов, кроме тех, что обусловлены таинствами Культа Машины".

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."
"My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."
"My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

languages.text: «Mi estimado colega jamás revelaría detalles íntimos sobre mi persona. Es más, a usted no le oculto ningún secreto salvo los que atañen a los misterios del Culto Máquina».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: «Mi estimado colega jamás revelaría detalles íntimos sobre mi persona. Es más, a usted no le oculto ningún secreto salvo los que atañen a los misterios del Culto Máquina».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚绝不会泄露任何关于我的私人信息。更何况，除了与机械修会的奥秘相关之事，我对您没有任何隐瞒。”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚绝不会泄露任何关于我的私人信息。更何况，除了与机械修会的奥秘相关之事，我对您没有任何隐瞒。”

languages.text: « Mon très cher collègue ne révélerait jamais d'informations privées à mon sujet. De plus, je ne vous cache rien, sinon les secrets au sujet du culte de la machine. »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: « Mon très cher collègue ne révélerait jamais d'informations privées à mon sujet. De plus, je ne vous cache rien, sinon les secrets au sujet du culte de la machine. »

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, hakkımda asla özel bilgi ifşa etmez. Üstelik, Makine Tarikatı'nın gizemleriyle ilgili olanlar dışında sizden hiç sır saklamıyorum."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, hakkımda asla özel bilgi ifşa etmez. Üstelik, Makine Tarikatı'nın gizemleriyle ilgili olanlar dışında sizden hiç sır saklamıyorum."

languages.text: 「我が親愛なる同僚が、私についての個人的な情報を漏らすことなど決してありません。それに、機械教の秘奥に関わるものを除けば、私にはあなたに隠し事など何もないのです」
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: 「我が親愛なる同僚が、私についての個人的な情報を漏らすことなど決してありません。それに、機械教の秘奥に関わるものを除けば、私にはあなたに隠し事など何もないのです」

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege würde niemals private Informationen über mich weitergeben. Abgesehen davon habe ich keine Geheimnisse vor Euch, solange sie nicht die Mysterien des Maschinenkultes betreffen."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague would never disclose private information about me. Moreover, I have no secrets from you except those pertaining to the mysteries of the Machine Cult."

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege würde niemals private Informationen über mich weitergeben. Abgesehen davon habe ich keine Geheimnisse vor Euch, solange sie nicht die Mysterien des Maschinenkultes betreffen."
